zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Stubberd是Stubberd和Christian Ferguson的女兒，於大約1510年出生。她於1525年7月30日與Richard Wood在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特聖 馬丁 在 馮 菲爾茲結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1615年7月28日在英國素瑞洛瑟爾享年106歲，埋葬在英國素瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Stubberd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stobbart
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Stubard, Stobard, late Old English * Stubheard, recorded only in E Anglia, so the surname in post-medieval NE England may be due to migration from there via the east coast trade route. The post-medieval surname may have been confused with Stappard and Stopford , and in E Anglia it may have been absorbed into Stibbard .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Stubberd was born about 1510 as the daughter of Stubberd and Christian Ferguson. She married Richard Wood on 30 July 1525, in St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 28 July 1615, in Rotherhithe, Surrey, England, at the age of 106, and was buried in Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Stubberd est née environ 1510, fille de Stubberd et Christian Ferguson. Elle a épousé Richard Wood le 30 juillet 1525, à St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 juillet 1615, à Rotherhithe, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 106 ans, et a été enterrée à Surrey, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Stubberdは約1510年にStubberdとChristian Fergusonの娘として生まれた。1525年7月30日にイギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスタースト マルティン イン ス フィールズでRichard Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1615年7月28日にイギリススリーロスエルヒスで106歳で死去し，イギリススリーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, Lo: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 스트 마틴 인 테 필드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Stubberd(은)는 대략 1510년 Stubberd(와)과 Christian Ferguson의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1525년 7월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 스트 마틴 인 테 필드즈에서 Richard Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 7월 28일 영국 수리 로더히테에서 106세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Stubberd родилась около 1510 г. Её родителей звали Stubberd и Christian Ferguson. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Wood 30 июля 1525 г. в местности ст мартинь ин т фиелдс, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 июля 1615 г. в местности ротирит, сурри, Англия в возрасте 106 лет и была похоронена в местности сурри, Англия.
